name: Deep-Fried Plantain Rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel plantains and cut into 2-inch rounds.
2. Heat the oil in a small saucepan until hot but not smoking.
3. Drop each flattened plantain section into the hot oil, turning occasionally, until golden brown (about 2-3 minutes per side).
4. Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried plantains and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
